title: erigeron zollingeri
intro: Erigeron zollingeri, also known as Zollinger's fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Erigeron zollingeri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity, which can help prevent the growth of harmful bacteria. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties, and it is often used in herbal remedies for skin issues, respiratory problems, and digestive issues.
